rationale: The candidate paper proposes a novel architecture (VLA-Thinker) to improve VLA performance via image-based reasoning, which is a methodological contribution rather than an empirical measurement of the "commonsense and world knowledge" baseline or deficits that the user's question (referencing the "Does VLA Even Know the Basics?" paper) seeks to investigate.
